market_pulse: Competitor activity strong across pool and nightclub circuits with major artists booked through end of month; OMNIA leading with Zedd, Deorro, Latin Sundays focus; LIV maintaining David Guetta + emerging talent strategy.

content_gaps.description: OMNIA running DESEO Latin Sundays with dedicated programming; no matching LIV initiative currently visible.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Develop Latin-focused Sunday event or partnership for LIV to capture weekend crossover demographic.

content_gaps.description: Competitors featuring Noizu, Mathame, Ray Volpe, and underground talent; LIV positioning more legacy artists.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Curate emerging tech-house/house talent series to attract Gen-Z and underground enthusiasts.

content_gaps.description: TikTok creators promoting competitor venues with day-count and FOMO content; LIV less visible in trending audio.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Partner with 3-5 micro-influencers (10k-100k followers) for Stories and Reels countdown content to next major event.

influencer_activity.mention: Posted honest review of LIV Nightclub as guest list attendee; highlights venue experience and energy.
Las Vegas promoter with 176K followers covering XS/Encore events; drives VIP and guest list traffic.
Active TikTok promoter highlighting Hakkasan and competing venues; R&Bae Wednesdays generating momentum.
